testcase.name: State - WidgetState - Test configuration V1 to widget state

State - WidgetState - Can copy widget state
State - WidgetState - Can create empty object
State - ConfigurationWidgetState - Can copy configuration state

BuildResultRowState - Can retrieve previous timeline record

StageResultCellState - Can create from properties
StageResultCellState - Can return timelineRecord undefined
StageResultCellState - Can return previousTimelineRecordState undefined
StageResultCell - Render
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result undefined expecting stage-success as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result 2 expecting stage-failed as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result 0 expecting stage-success as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result 1 expecting stage-warning as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result 5 expecting stage-neutral as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result 3 expecting stage-neutral as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class for stage result 4 expecting stage-neutral as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stge underline class for stage status 2 expecting stage-success as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stge underline class for stage status 0 expecting stage-neutral as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stge underline class for stage status 1 expecting stage-active as a result
StageResultCell - Get the stage underline class when the stage has failed
BuildResultRow - Render - No stages
BuildResultRow - Render - With stages
Create a widget row for a build with '2' as a result
Create a widget row for a build with '8' as a result
Create a widget row for a build with '32' as a result
Create a widget row for a build with '4' as a result
Create a widget row for a build with '0' as a result
Create a widget row for a build with '10' as a result
StageStatus - Render
StageStatus - taskResult is null or undefined
StageStatus - stageStatus is pending
StageStatus - stageStatus is pending with the previous stage completed
StageStatus - taskResult is null or undefined with startTime
StageStatus - taskResult is null or undefined with startTime at 0
Stage Status - Can render badge for task result 5
Stage Status - Can render badge for task result 2
Stage Status - Can render badge for task result 0
Stage Status - Can render badge for task result 1

Widget - Render with no configuration
Widget - Render with filled configuration
Widget - Render with filled configuration and tags
Widget - Render with filled configuration, pre-selected tag and "matchAnyTag" set to true
Widget - Render with filled configuration, pre-selected tag and "matchAnyTag" set to false
Widget - Render tag selection dropdown, select a tag then clear them all
Widget - Render with invalid data
ConfigurationWidget - Render with no configuration settings
Configuration - Render with no configuration settings and definition not empty
Configuration - Render with configuration and definition not empty
Configuration - Render with configuration and definition or branches not empty
Configuration - Render with matching branch
Configuration - Render with matching branch starting with refs/heads/ in the configuration
Configuration - Render with matching branch starting with tags
Configuration - Test onBuildDropdownChange
Configuration - Test onBuildCountChanged with new value NaN and expected result 1
Configuration - Test onBuildCountChanged with new value 5 and expected result 5
Configuration - Test onBuildCountChanged with new value 51 and expected result 1
Configuration - Test onBuildCountChanged with new value 0 and expected result 1
Configuration - Test onBuildCountChanged with new value 50 and expected result 50
